name: Guy Crimson
form: Demon Lord Original, Rey Demonio Carmesí
description: Guy Crimson is the oldest of the Demon Lords. He has forever ruled over the frozen continent. Being androgynous, he can become a man or woman at will.

name: Milim Nava
description: __Kind:__ Inhabitant "Destroyer" Milim Nava is one of the oldest and strongest Demon Lords. She is a Dragonoid. Her nickname, Destroyer, is not just for show. She is a demon lord one should never fight against.

name: Milim Nava
description: __Kind:__ Inhabitant "Destroyer" Milim Nava is one of the oldest and strongest Demon Lords. She is a Dragonoid. Her nickname, Destroyer, is not just for show. She is a demon lord one should never fight against.

name: Diablo
description: Diablo is the Black Primordial and a loyal servant of [Rimuru Tempest](https://anilist.co/character/123962/Tempest-Rimuru). Before he met Rimuru, he went by the nicknames Black or Noir, the latter which he received from his fellow Primordial kin.

name: Benimaru
description: Benimaru Shinmon is a hybrid Second and Third Generation, as well as the Captain of Special Fire Force Company 7. Benimaru is regarded as the strongest Fire Officer in the Special Fire Force.

name: Shion
description: "War Lord" Shion is Rimuru’s first servant to be in charge of his care as his personal secretary. She is also the leader of the Yomigaeri and also one of Rimuru's strongest fighters and is coveted by many of the Demon Lords who have met her.

name: Souei
description: __Height__: 180 cm (Kijin), 190 cm (Ogre) Souei is an Ogre that was among the third group of subordinates to be named by Rimuru Tempest. He is Rimuru's faithful shadow and the leader of the Shadow Squad of the Jura Tempest Federation.

name: Souei

name: Hakuro
description: Hakurou is a Fair Oni and is a loyal follower of Rimuru Tempest. He was one of the survivors of the Orc attack. He was also the teacher of the Dwarven King.

name: Hakuro
description: Hakurou is a Fair Oni and is a loyal follower of Rimuru Tempest. He was one of the survivors of the Orc attack. He was also the teacher of the Dwarven King.

name: Gobta
description: Gobta is a hobgoblin and is one of Rimuru Tempest's followers. Though he seems to be air-headed he tends to be a hard-worker and dependable when the time calls for it.

name: Gobta
description: Gobta is a hobgoblin and is one of Rimuru Tempest's followers. Though he seems to be air-headed he tends to be a hard-worker and dependable when the time calls for it.

name: Ranga
description: __Height:__ 178 cm (5'10") __Talent:__ Snowboarding, Skateboarding At first glance, Langa appears to be a very stoic young man, barely showing any emotions. But on the inside, he’s more complex and appears to be more confident.

name: Ranga
description:
__Height:__ 178 cm (5'10")
__Talent:__ Snowboarding, Skateboarding

At first glance, Langa appears to be a very stoic young man, barely showing any emotions. But on the inside, he’s more complex and appears to be more confident.

Langa is a teenage boy with blue hair that grows past his ears and blue eyes. He is above average height as he’s taller than [Reki](https://anilist.co/character/195120/Reki-Kyan). Throughout the series, Langa wears the average high school uniform of black pants, a yellow jacket, and a white button-down shirt. But when he associates with [Reki](https://anilist.co/character/195120/Reki-Kyan) he wears baggy clothes consisting of dark pants, a blue coat, and a gray-colored shirt.

Langa was born in Canada to a Japanese mother and Canadian father and grew up snowboarding. As a teenager, he and his mother moved to Okinawa to start anew.

name: Hinata Sakaguchi
description: Hinata Sakaguchi is an otherworlder and the leader of the Imperial Guards under the Pope's direct command. Along with Yuuki and Class S, she's a former student of Shizue Izawa. ~!At first she thought monsters should all be exterminated.

name: Clayman
description: Demon Lord Clayman, is one of the ten demon lords that ~!existed before Rimuru became a demon lord. He turned into Kazaream's underling when Kazaream turned him into a demon lord.!~

name: Leon Cromwell
description: Leon Cromwell is a former hero and a current Demon Lord of the Eight-pointed Star Octagram. He is the ruler of El Dorado, an island nation located south-west of the world.

name: Frey
description: Qifrey is a witch and [Coco](https://anilist.co/character/129840/Coco)'s teacher. He runs an atelier and currently has four disciples. He is a caring teacher who patiently teaches his students magic.

name: Dagruel
form: Demon Lord, el Puño de Hierro
description: "Earthquake" Daggrull is a giant that is close friends with Deeno. He is the fourth seat of the Octagram (Eight-Star Demon Lords).

name: Carrion
description: ~!Karion is one of the ten demon lords that existed before Rimuru became a demon lord. During the Walpurgis Banquet where Rimuru killed Clayman. Karion became a subordinate of Milim.!~

name: Ramiris
description: Ramiris is a fairy that resides inside of Tempest's Underground Labyrinth. She is also one of the Eight-Star Demon Lords.

name: Velgrynd
description: Velgrynd is the third of the True Dragon species. She is known for her cardinal red dragon body, scorching heat abilities, and insanely fast movement speed.

name: Velzard
description: Velzard, also known as White Ice Dragon, is the second-oldest of the four True Dragons and the partner of Guy Crimson. Uninterested in most worldly matters, Velzard usually spends her time in the Palace of White Ice, releasing her aura that keeps the Ice Continent frozen.

name: Chloe Aubert
description: One of the children who were incompletely summoned. Chloe is a quiet child who loves books.

name: Kagurazaka Yuuki
description: A former student of Shizu who originally came from Japan and ~!one of the main antagonists of the series. !~ Yuuki serves as the Guild Master of the Adventurers' Guild in the kingdom of Ingracia, and he loves manga.

name: Gelmud
description: A majin that served Demon Lord Clayman of the Ten Great Demon Lords. He wanted to make Orc Lord the new Demon Lord and manipulate him but instead was devoured by it.

name: Charybdis
description: Second season of Tensei shitara Ken deshita.

name: Testarossa
description: __Intelligent Device:__ [Bardiche](https://anilist.co/character/220250/Bardiche) __Rank:__ S+, (StrikerS) Captain, Lightning Unit, Lightning One Fate first appears with Arf and Bardiche, materializing in the town in search of Jewel Seeds.

name: Ultima
description: __Teams:__ Yukigaoka Junior High (Former); Karasuno High (Current) __Number:__ 1 (Junior High 3rd Year); 10 (High School 1st year); 5 (High School 3rd year) __Position:__ Captain (Junior High); Outside Hitter (Junior High); Middle Blocker (High School) Hinata has an unusually high ability to jump.

name: Carrera
description: Carera was one of the demons convened by Diablo to serve Rimuru. She was originally an Arch Demon, but after being named by Rimuru she evolved into a Demon Peer.

name: Rigurd
form: Goblin King, jefe de la aldea
description: Formerly the chief of the goblin village Rimuru comes across. He's now the acting prime minister of the Jura Tempest Federation. He evolved into a hobgoblin when Rimuru named him.

name: Geld
form: Ogro, guerrero de la aldea vecina
description: He is one of the fourth group of subordinates to be named by Rimuru Tempest. As the right-hand man of the deceased Orc Lord, he was given the same name as him, as a memento and token of appreciation, similar to how Rigur was named after his older brother.

name: Geld
description: He is one of the fourth group of subordinates to be named by Rimuru Tempest. As the right-hand man of the deceased Orc Lord, he was given the same name as him, as a memento and token of appreciation, similar to how Rigur was named after his older brother.

name: Kaijin
description: Kaijin Hime Do-S is a female dominatrix monster of the Monster Association who uses her whip to turn her opponents into love slaves. She is able to enslave the Blizzard Bunch, but Blizzard herself is able to resist.

name: Adalmann
description: Adalman, formerly the Index Finger of Clayman's Five Fingers, is an Undead and the guardian of the 70th floor of Ramiris' Labyrinth.

name: Gazel Dwargo
description: Species: Dwarf Blessing / Divine Protection: Divine Protector of Ancestor Title: King of Armament Nation Dwargon. The king of Dwargon, Gazel Dwargo, the third generation king of Dwargon, but possesses a similar aura to that of his grandfather in his younger days.
